title: ECB warns about eurozone fragility and Euribor falls below 2.7%
summary: German industrial production surprises to the upside, while European bonds rise and the central bank calls for plans ahead of AI attacks.

title: Crude oil prices fall due to excess supply and weak global demand
summary: Gulf exporters cut prices, China increases purchases, and Greek shipping companies transport Russian crude.

title: Ford, Renault, Rivian and Volkswagen move the automotive sector with deals and emissions
summary: Ford signs chip deal with Micron, Renault rejects BYD offers, Rivian offers 75 million shares and Volkswagen shows a technical rebound.

title: Samsung announces record profits but its stock plummets and drags down Asian markets
summary: The South Korean tech giant posts record profits in the second quarter, but the drop in its stock price triggers massive sell-offs in semiconductors and Asian stock markets.

title: SpaceX enters the Nasdaq-100 with a stock price decline
summary: Elon Musk's company joins the benchmark technology index, while investors react with sales and expectations about its future.

title: SK Hynix warns Sandisk and attracts hedge fund bets on its possible US IPO
summary: The chipmaker issues a warning on inventories while a former OpenAI researcher bets on its US IPO and investors debate the memory sector.

title: Air France-KLM and IAG rise driven by recommendations and EasyJet negotiates its purchase for 5.5 billion
summary: European airlines gain value as EasyJet reaches a preliminary acquisition agreement with Castlelake.

title: Artificial intelligence stocks take center stage with warnings, predictions and investor bets
summary: Nvidia, Palantir and Meta issue a warning, while analysts publish their AI stock picks for the second half of the year.

title: Global markets trade mixed amid tech uncertainty and Dow Jones records
summary: US futures give way due to AI focus, Germany's Dax alternates records and declines, and US stocks close with mixed results.

title: Citi joins the gold market, ING buys Singular Bank and the Big Four face problems in Australia
summary: Movements in banking: Citi enters gold clearing, ING acquires the Spanish bank and the large audit firms deal with scandals in the Oceanian country.

title: Personal finance tips: habits of the wealthy, Social Security and investing for children dominate the debate
summary: Americans are interested in the habits of the 'quietly wealthy', the optimal time to collect Social Security and UGMA accounts for minors.

title: Trump rings the Wall Street bell from the White House and the Dow Jones hits a new record
summary: The President of the United States symbolically participates in the closing of the New York Stock Exchange, which reaches an all-time high.

title: HSBC withdraws from private credit loans to reduce its risk
summary: The British bank abandons the private credit fund business, considered high-risk, according to financial press reports.

title: Cirsa issues bonds for 500 million and marks one year on the stock market with a 15% drop
summary: The gaming company launches a debt issuance maturing in 2032 while its stock has accumulated a decline since its IPO.

title: Funcas improves its GDP forecast for Spain to 2.5% and Invesco is optimistic about the Spanish stock market
summary: The analysis center raises its growth estimate for this year, while the investment manager is confident in the potential of the Spanish market.

title: Ibex 35 recovers 19,700 points in a session of moderate gains
summary: The Spanish benchmark rises 0.5% and approaches 19,800 points, with Logista, Puig and Amadeus among the most bullish stocks.

title: Investment recommendations: dividend ETFs, financial stocks and Apple after the drop
summary: Analysts recommend high-yield ETFs, financial securities and star stocks like Apple after the pullback.

title: Carrefour rises on RBC coverage and Best Buy and Apple warn about price increases
summary: The French retailer gains value after the start of favorable coverage, while US chains warn about rising product prices.

title: Opdenergy closes financing for 371 MW in Chile and offshore wind advances in Japan
summary: The Spanish company obtains 227 million for solar projects, while Yamagata boosts offshore wind power and a Spanish renewable company shows weakness.

title: Sector rotation activates a bullish signal in a Continuo company and Endesa pays dividend
summary: Investors follow sector rotation and Endesa's dividend, while high stock prices become a status symbol.
